what_it_does: Defines the ViStatusPill React component: a small inline pill that shows Vi's current activity. It renders a mini ViMark (18px, no glyph) followed by children text; when `live` is true it adds a 'live' class (a pulsing pill animation in vi.css) and animates the mini mark. Exposed on window.
observations: Props: children (the status text) and live (default false).
Composes ViMark at size 18 with showGlyph={false} and animated={live} as the pill's leading icon.
Toggles the 'live' CSS class on the pill based on the `live` prop (drives the vi-pulse-pill animation defined in vi.css).
Assigns window.ViStatusPill; depends on a global ViMark and global React (no imports/exports).
Very small (10 lines) — a thin composition over ViMark plus styled text.
standouts: Reuses ViMark (animated, glyph-less) as the pill icon — the same brand mark expresses 'Vi is doing something' inline at small size.
conventions: Browser-global component pattern (window.ViStatusPill, global React/ViMark), consistent with the rest of the Vi kit.
Single-source reuse: leans on ViMark and vi.css classes rather than re-implementing icon or animation.
notes: A tiny inline status pill ('Vi is reading…') that reuses an animated mini ViMark; pass children for the text and `live` for the pulsing/active state.
questions: What values are typically passed as children, and is `live` meant only for in-progress states? (App.jsx uses `live` for the reading step.)
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the comment ('inline pill showing Vi's current activity') matches the small icon+text pill with a live/animated state it renders.
apparent_themes: Composition over duplication (built from ViMark + vi.css)
intention_signals: Tries to provide a drop-in indicator of what Vi is doing right now that works inside any surface, reusing the brand mark so the indicator is recognisably 'Vi'.
contribution: Contributes the small, embeddable Vi activity indicator that composes the animated ViMark with status text and a live-pulse state.
summary_for_embedding: React ViStatusPill component: a small inline activity pill composing an 18px animated glyph-less ViMark with status text and a `live` pulsing state, exposed on window.
intention_for_embedding: To show Vi's current activity inline in any surface using a recognisable, optionally-pulsing mini brand mark plus text.
